label_notes: Source: training knowledge (WebFetch blocked 2026-03-20). Based on Roblox Privacy Policy through mid-2025. Notable: Platform has primarily young user base (minimum age 9); strong COPPA compliance required. Age-based access restrictions in place. Chat moderation extensive due to child safety. Targeted advertising to minors remains concern despite restrictions.
